summary: Verified all features from this session: 1) Pet Soul auto-population working - name, breed, gender pre-fill from pet root properties on UnifiedPetPage, 2) Navigation updated - Adopt, Farewell, Shop visible in 'More' dropdown and Footer, 3) Adopt page fully functional with 5 seeded pets, category cards, and application flows, 4) All Adopt API endpoints working (GET /api/adopt/pets, stats, events, shelters, categories), 5) Farewell and Shop pages load correctly with full content

minor.issue: Returns empty array - shelters not seeded in database
Returns empty array - events not seeded in database

details: Name, breed, gender auto-populate from pet root properties
Identity & Temperament pillar shows 8/8 (100%) with auto-populated fields
coreFields object at lines 973-980 and 1027-1033 in UnifiedPetPage.jsx handles mapping
Green checkmarks show for auto-populated fields
Adopt pillar visible in More dropdown with icon and description
Farewell pillar visible in More dropdown with icon and description
Shop pillar visible in More dropdown with icon and description
All three pillars defined in Navbar.jsx lines 261-306
Footer.jsx lines 94-96 contain links to /farewell, /adopt, /shop
Hero section with 'Adopt, Don't Shop' message
Stats section showing available pets count
4 category cards: Rescue, Shelter, Foster, Events
5 seeded pets displayed with photos, details, and 'Adopt Me' buttons
Filter functionality by species, size, age
GET /api/adopt/pets - Returns 5 seeded pets
GET /api/adopt/stats - Returns available_pets=5, total_adopted=0
GET /api/adopt/events - Returns empty array (no events seeded)
GET /api/adopt/shelters - Returns empty array (no shelters seeded)
GET /api/adopt/categories - Returns rescue, shelter, foster, rehoming, events
POST /api/adopt/applications - Creates adoption application
POST /api/adopt/foster/apply - Creates foster application
Hero section with 'Honouring the Bond' and rainbow emoji
4 service categories: Hospice & Palliative Care, Cremation Services, Memorial Services, Grief Support
Memorial Service Packages section visible
Hero section with 'Everything Your Pet Needs'
790 products displayed in catalog
Category filters: All Products, Food & Nutrition, Treats & Snacks, Toys & Play, Grooming, Accessories, Health & Wellness, Celebrations
Quick filters: Best Sellers, New Arrivals, On Sale, Grain Free, Organic, Subscribe & Save

action_items: OPTIONAL: Seed adoption events to database for events section
OPTIONAL: Seed partner shelters to database for shelters section
critical_code_review_comments: Pet Soul auto-population correctly uses coreFields object to map pet root properties (name, breed, gender) to questionnaire fields
Navbar.jsx pillars array correctly includes Adopt, Farewell, Shop with proper icons, colors, and sub-items
adopt_router correctly imported and included in server.py at line 8456
seed_data_creation: 5 adoptable pets seeded by main agent (Luna, Max, Whiskers, Bruno, Ginger)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from this session verified: Pet Soul auto-population working, Adopt/Farewell/Shop in navigation, Adopt page fully functional with 5 pets. Minor: shelters and events collections are empty but endpoints work. Shop has 790 products, Farewell has memorial services content.
